name: Arjun Mehta
bio: Met during freshman orientation. We bonded over bad cafeteria food and late-night debugging sessions. Now he's a backend dev in Bangalore.

name: Nadia Rahman
bio: My team lead from the first internship. She taught me to write clean code and ask better questions. We still grab coffee virtually every month.

name: Tanvir Hossain
bio: Known him since we were 8. We used to race bikes down our street. Now he's studying civil engineering and we catch up whenever I'm home.

name: Priya Kapoor
bio: We built our final-year project together — a sensor-based smart irrigation system. She's incredibly resourceful. Now doing her Master's in Canada.

name: Rafi Uddin
bio: Met through a competitive programming Discord server. We've played dozens of online contests together. He's brilliant at dynamic programming.

name: Sadia Islam
bio: Family friend turned book club partner. We trade recommendations every week and have wildly different tastes, which makes the discussions great.

name: Leo Fernandes
bio: Met at a 48-hour hackathon in Dhaka. We built a waste-management app and won 3rd place. He's been pushing me to co-found something ever since.

name: Meghna Das
bio: Best friend from high school. We drifted apart when she moved to Chittagong for college, but when we reconnect it always feels like no time has passed.
